category_sources: Official Knot Resolver homepage describes it as a caching DNS resolver.
source_facts.description says caching DNSSEC-validating DNS resolver.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and docs use Knot Resolver.
docs_sources: Official Knot Resolver documentation page is under knot-resolver.cz/documentation/latest.
Official site navigation links to Documentation.
repo_sources: Official Knot Resolver Development page lists https://gitlab.nic.cz/knot/knot-resolver.git as the repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe an open-source caching validating DNS resolver with modular architecture.
source_facts.description identifies caching and DNSSEC validation.
